title: Cerenkov-Activated Sticky Tag for In Vivo Fluorescence Imaging.
author: Das S Haedicke K Grimm J
content: S-EPMC5750525 PMC5750525 Cerenkov-Activated Sticky Tag for In Vivo Fluorescence Imaging. A big challenge in the clinical use of Cerenkov luminescence (CL) imaging is its low signal intensity, which is several orders of magnitude below ambient light. Consequently, highly sensitive cameras
